decks.name: Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow - Ninja Tribal

results.deckName: Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow - Ninja Tribal
warnings: Model output had 107 cards after color filter; list trimmed to 100.
Mana base pass removed non-mana additions that fell outside the pass scope.
results.summary: Transformed: Mana base improvement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.33.
results.why: This pass tightens [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]]'s mana base by replacing slower or lower-impact lands and off-plan nonlands with cleaner blue-black fixing and a couple of simple ramp pieces. The added lands improve color access and untapped development, while the artifacts help reach key mana more consistently. Cutting excess basics and weaker utility slots keeps the deck focused on smoother early turns at a casual power level.

raw.summary: Transformed: Mana base improvement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.33.
raw.plan: This pass tightens [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]]'s mana base by replacing slower or lower-impact lands and off-plan nonlands with cleaner blue-black fixing and a couple of simple ramp pieces. The added lands improve color access and untapped development, while the artifacts help reach key mana more consistently. Cutting excess basics and weaker utility slots keeps the deck focused on smoother early turns at a casual power level.
raw.why: This pass tightens [[Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow]]'s mana base by replacing slower or lower-impact lands and off-plan nonlands with cleaner blue-black fixing and a couple of simple ramp pieces. The added lands improve color access and untapped development, while the artifacts help reach key mana more consistently. Cutting excess basics and weaker utility slots keeps the deck focused on smoother early turns at a casual power level.

added.clearwater pathway: [[Clearwater Pathway]] gives flexible blue or black fixing from a land slot.
added.coldsteel heart: [[Coldsteel Heart]] adds simple two-mana ramp while fixing a needed color.
added.drowned catacomb: [[Drowned Catacomb]] improves Dimir fixing with a strong chance to enter untapped.
added.fabled passage: [[Fabled Passage]] upgrades fixing by finding the basic color you need.
added.prismatic vista: [[Prismatic Vista]] gives efficient color access by fetching a basic untapped.
added.shipwreck marsh: [[Shipwreck Marsh]] is a dual land that supports smoother midgame color fixing.
added.sunken ruins: [[Sunken Ruins]] converts awkward draws into reliable blue-black mana.
added.watery grave: [[Watery Grave]] is premium Dimir fixing that can enter untapped when needed.
added.wayfarer's bauble: [[Wayfarer's Bauble]] helps ramp and stabilizes colors through basic land search.

removed.swamp: Extra [[Swamp]] copies were trimmed to make room for stronger fixing lands.
removed.blinkmoth infusion: [[Blinkmoth Infusion]] was outside the mana-base focus of this pass.
removed.consign // oblivion: [[Consign // Oblivion]] was removed because this update was limited to mana consistency changes.
removed.consult the necrosages: [[Consult the Necrosages]] was cut to keep the pass focused on improving the mana base.
removed.dimir aqueduct: [[Dimir Aqueduct]] is slower than the replacement fixing lands in this update.
removed.island: An [[Island]] was trimmed to open space for higher-quality dual and fetch lands.
removed.reliquary tower: [[Reliquary Tower]] provides colorless mana, which is less helpful for color consistency here.
removed.rogue's passage: [[Rogue's Passage]] was cut because its colorless mana hurts smoother early development.

warnings: Model output had 107 cards after color filter; list trimmed to 100.
Mana base pass removed non-mana additions that fell outside the pass scope.
